title: Nursery Rhyme. DLXXX. Natural History.
content:
The pettitoes are little feet,
            And the little feet not big;
        Great feet belong to the grunting hog,
            And the pettitoes to the little pig.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. DLXXX. Natural History."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
